data.title: Why Choose Manychat: Turn DMs Into Revenue
data.excerpt: Discover why 1M+ marketers use Manychat to automate Instagram, WhatsApp & Messenger. Capture leads, close sales & grow your audience on autopilot.

$media.alt: Why Choose Manychat: Turn DMs Into Revenue

children.text: *Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through our links, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.*

I was drowning in DMs. Every morning, my Instagram had 47 unread messages—half were people asking the same questions about my products, the other half were potential buyers who never got a reply because I was asleep or stuck in a meeting. Sound familiar?
Then I found Manychat, and the way I handle social media conversations completely changed. Not gradually. Not over months. Within the first week.

If you run any kind of business through social media—whether you're a solo creator, an e-commerce brand, or a marketing agency—this post will show you exactly why Manychat deserves a permanent spot in your stack. And honestly? The
free plan is generous enough
Manychat
that you can test everything I'm about to describe without spending a cent.
What Is Manychat and How Does It Work?

Manychat is a chat marketing automation platform that connects directly to Instagram DMs, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, TikTok, and Telegram. Think of it as a smart assistant that lives inside your social media inboxes—one that never sleeps, never forgets to follow up, and scales conversations the way email marketing scaled newsletters.

Here's the core idea: instead of manually replying to every DM, comment, and story reaction, you build automated conversation flows. A follower comments "PRICE" on your latest post, and within seconds they receive a personalized DM with your product link, pricing, and even a discount code. No human required.

The platform works through a visual flow builder. You drag and drop elements—messages, buttons, delays, conditions—to create conversation paths that feel natural. No coding. No complex integrations. If you can use Canva, you can build a Manychat flow.
What really sets Manychat apart is its official partnerships. It's a
Meta Business Partner

and a TikTok Marketing Partner. This means the integrations aren't patchwork hacks—they're approved, stable, and built to last. When Instagram changes its API rules (which happens more often than we'd like), Manychat adapts first because it has direct access to Meta's engineering resources.
Key Features That Actually Move the Needle
Let me walk through the features I use daily, because these aren't theoretical—they produce measurable results.
Comment Automation

This is the feature that made me a believer. You set up triggers so that when someone comments a specific keyword on your post or reel, Manychat automatically sends them a DM. I use this for every product launch now. Post a reel, tell people to comment "LINK," and watch qualified leads pour into your inbox while you do literally anything else. One creator I follow reported a 340% increase in link clicks after switching from "link in bio" to automated DM delivery.
Story Mention & Reply Automation
When someone mentions you in their story or replies to yours, Manychat can trigger a personalized response. This turns passive engagement into active conversation without you lifting a finger.
WhatsApp Business Integration

WhatsApp is massive internationally, and Manychat's integration is tight. You can send catalogs, payment links, and follow-up sequences through WhatsApp the same way you'd build them for Instagram. If your audience is in Latin America, Europe, or Southeast Asia, this feature alone justifies the platform.
Visual Flow Builder

The drag-and-drop interface lets you map out entire customer journeys. Welcome sequences, abandoned cart reminders, webinar confirmations, post-purchase follow-ups—you name it. The logic branching is powerful: if a user clicks "Yes," they go down path A; if they click "No," path B. You can add conditions based on tags, custom fields, and previous interactions.
Audience Segmentation & Tags

Manychat lets you tag users based on their behavior. Clicked a product link? Tag them as "interested in [product]." Replied to three messages? Tag them as "highly engaged." These tags become the backbone of targeted broadcasts and personalized follow-ups.
Broadcasts & Sequences

Once you've built an audience, you can send mass messages to segmented groups—similar to email blasts but with open rates that crush email. We're talking 80-90% open rates on Instagram DMs versus 20-25% on email. Sequences let you drip messages over days or weeks, nurturing leads automatically.
Live Chat Handoff

Automation doesn't mean eliminating the human touch. When a conversation gets complex or a high-value lead needs personal attention, Manychat seamlessly hands off to a live agent. You get notified, jump in, and continue the conversation inside the same thread.
Here's a deeper walkthrough on how to use Manychat
for this exact workflow.
Payments Integration

Manychat integrates with Stripe, allowing you to collect payments directly inside a chat conversation. Someone wants your product? They tap a button, enter their card details, and the transaction happens without leaving the DM. This frictionless checkout process has been a game-changer for impulse purchases.
New and Highlighted Features Worth Your Attention
Manychat keeps shipping updates at a pace that genuinely impresses me. Here are the standout additions from recent months:
AI-Powered Intents (Manychat AI)

This is the big one. Manychat now uses natural language processing to understand what a user means, not just what they type. Instead of building rigid keyword triggers, you can train the AI to recognize intents like "pricing question," "shipping inquiry," or "complaint." The bot responds intelligently, even when users phrase things unpredictably. For anyone who's struggled with "but what if they type something I didn't anticipate?"—this solves it.
TikTok DM Automation

Manychat was one of the first platforms to offer TikTok DM automation as an official Marketing Partner. When your TikTok video goes viral and hundreds of people comment, Manychat handles the DM flood automatically. Given TikTok's explosive reach, this feature opens up audience segments that Instagram alone can't touch.
SMS and Email Channels

Beyond chat, Manychat now supports SMS and email as additional channels within the same automation flows. You can build omnichannel sequences: Instagram DM on day 1, email on day 3, SMS on day 5. All managed from one dashboard. It's not trying to replace dedicated email tools, but having these channels integrated into your chat flows is incredibly convenient.
Growth Tools & Landing Pages

Manychat's native growth tools let you create opt-in pages, QR codes, and direct links that funnel people into your automated conversations. Pair these with paid ads or organic content, and you've got a lead generation engine that operates 24/7.
Analytics Dashboard

The reporting has gotten significantly better. You can now track message delivery rates, open rates, click-through rates, conversion rates, and revenue attribution—all tied to specific flows and campaigns. Data-driven marketers will appreciate the granularity. If you want to explore
new features in depth
, we've got a dedicated breakdown.
Who Is Manychat Ideal For?
Not every tool fits every person, so let me be specific about who gets the most value from Manychat.
E-commerce Brands

If you sell physical or digital products through Instagram or WhatsApp, Manychat is almost unfair. Automated product recommendations, abandoned cart recovery through DMs, flash sale announcements to segmented lists—the revenue potential is significant. Brands using Manychat for Instagram DM automation routinely report conversion rates 3-5x higher than traditional email campaigns.
Content Creators & Influencers

When you post a new video, course, or collaboration, Manychat turns engagement into action. "Comment FREE to get my guide" triggers an instant DM with the download link. Your audience gets what they want immediately, and you capture their contact info for future launches. No more "link in bio" friction.
Coaches & Course Creators

Selling high-ticket services? Manychat qualifies leads through automated conversations before booking them onto your calendar. Ask qualifying questions, segment by budget or interest, and only hand off the warmest leads for a sales call.
Check out these specific use cases
for service-based businesses.
Marketing Agencies

Managing multiple clients? Manychat's Pro plan supports multiple accounts, and the flow templates can be duplicated across brands. Agencies use it to deliver chat automation as a service, adding recurring revenue without proportional workload increases.
Small Businesses & Solopreneurs

Even if you're a one-person operation, the free plan gives you 25 active contacts with basic automations. That's enough to automate your most common DM conversations and test whether chat marketing works for your audience before committing to a paid plan.
Pricing: How Manychat Scales With You
Manychat's pricing follows a contact-based model that grows as your audience grows. Here's the breakdown:
Free Plan — $0/month
25 active contacts
Connect up to 2 channels (Instagram, TikTok, Messenger, or Telegram)
Basic automations with up to 4 active flows
Access to 60+ ready-made templates
This is genuinely useful for testing. You can build real automations, connect your Instagram, and see results before you pay anything.
Pro Plan — Starting at $15/month
Scales with your contact count
Unlimited automations and flows
All channels unlocked (including WhatsApp)
Advanced features: sequences, broadcasts, tags, custom fields
Priority support
Premium & Enterprise Plans
For larger operations needing dedicated support, custom integrations, and higher contact limits.

The annual billing option saves up to 30%, which is worth considering once you've validated the platform with the free plan. My advice: start free, build your first automation, see the DMs roll in, then upgrade when you outgrow the 25-contact limit.
Ready to see what automated DMs can do for your business?
Start your free Manychat account here
Manychat
and build your first flow today.
Tips to Get Maximum Value From Day One
Before you dive in, a few quick pointers that saved me weeks of trial and error:
Start with comment automation.
It's the fastest path to results. Pick your best-performing post, set up a keyword trigger, and watch engagement convert into leads.
Use templates first.
Manychat has 60+ pre-built templates for common use cases. Modify them instead of building from scratch—you'll learn the flow builder faster this way.
Tag everything.
The more you tag users based on behavior, the smarter your future broadcasts and sequences become. Tags are the foundation of personalized marketing at scale.
More tips and best practices here
Connect WhatsApp early if your audience is international.
Don't wait. The setup takes minutes, and WhatsApp open rates are phenomenal in markets outside the US.
Test AI intents gradually.
Start with 2-3 intent categories, monitor accuracy, then expand. The AI gets smarter as you refine it.
Pair Manychat with your existing tools.
It integrates natively with Zapier, HubSpot, Google Sheets, ConvertKit, and dozens more. Your chat data flows into your CRM seamlessly. For advanced workflow automation,
n8n
connects beautifully with Manychat's API.
Why Manychat Wins Over Alternatives
I've tested other chat automation tools—
Wati.io
Bürch/Revealbot
, and several others. Each has strengths. But Manychat consistently wins on three fronts: ease of use, platform partnerships, and the sheer size of its template library and community.

The visual builder is the most intuitive I've used. The official Meta and TikTok partnerships mean your automations won't break when APIs change. And with over 1 million users, the community resources—YouTube tutorials, Facebook groups, template exchanges—are unmatched.
What is Manychat at its core?
Here's our full explainer
if you want the complete picture.
The Bottom Line

Manychat solves a problem that every social media business faces: how to have thousands of personalized conversations without hiring a team of people to manage your inboxes. The automation feels human. The setup is genuinely simple. The results are measurable from day one.

If your Instagram DMs are full of unanswered messages, if your WhatsApp inquiries pile up while you sleep, if your TikTok comments are goldmines you can't mine fast enough—Manychat is the tool that turns all of that into automated, revenue-generating conversations.
Create your free Manychat account now
Manychat
and start converting followers into customers today.

children.text: Is Manychat free to use?

Yes. Manychat offers a free plan that includes 25 active contacts, up to 2 connected channels (Instagram, TikTok, Messenger, or Telegram), and up to 4 active automations. It's enough to test the platform and see real results before upgrading to the Pro plan starting at $15/month.
Does Manychat work with WhatsApp Business?

Absolutely. Manychat has a native WhatsApp Business integration available on the Pro plan and above. You can build automated flows, send catalogs, collect payments, and run broadcast campaigns through WhatsApp just like you would on Instagram or Messenger.
Can I use Manychat for TikTok DM automation?

Yes. Manychat is an official TikTok Marketing Partner, which means its TikTok integration is built with direct API access. You can automate DM responses triggered by comments on your TikTok videos, manage conversations at scale, and convert TikTok engagement into leads and sales.
Do I need coding skills to build Manychat automations?

Not at all. Manychat uses a visual drag-and-drop flow builder that anyone can learn. You can also start from 60+ pre-built templates for common use cases like comment automation, welcome sequences, and product recommendations—no technical background required.
